---
id: set-base-permissions
title: "Set organization base permission"
description: "Set default granular (scope-based) permissions for organization users, who don't have direct project permissions set."
sidebar_label: "Set organization base permission"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set organization base permission"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/organizations/{organizationId}/set-base-permissions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Set default granular (scope-based) permissions for organization users, who don't have direct project permissions set.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
